title: .gitignore — keeping API keys and secrets out of public repositories

module.title: Version Control with Git and GitHub

course.title: Python for AI, PE, VC and RAG

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Cautionary flow: secret hardcoded in .py → git add → git push → automated bot scans → key stolen → charges; contrasted with safe path: secret in .env → .gitignore blocks → git add skips .env → repo has no secret
artifact_plan.depth_signals: Core Concepts has 7 sub-sections covering security consequences + two-part prevention pattern + Python loading pattern; Implementation section warranted; Real-World Patterns warranted
artifact_plan.depth_override_reason: Budget: 85/90 min spent; 1 unset topic remains. Author accepted atomic to stay at 90/90 min.
